Discuss the process of deploying a deep learning model, specifically designed using Python, on the Amazon Web Services (AWS) platform. CREATE A MODEL WITH PYTHON, USE AWS EC2 FOR DEPLOYMENT. * * *  
Deploy the model on AWS with proper configuration, SECURE DATA TRANSFER IS CRITICAL. MODEL PERFORMANCE MUST BE MONITORED, ERROR HANDLING IS NECESSARY. * * *  
Address overfitting by using regularization, DATA SECURITY MEASURES SHOULD BE ENFORCED. ALL CAPITAL LETTERS ARE IMPORTANT, MODEL ACCURACY IS KEY.
